creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #6)
This is the mention of the testing.
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-arm/2023-September/003111.html
"The new kernel prints the "No MAC address found" message, then panics."

More info about the panic is requested, but needs some time to provide.
